name: Sour Cream Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 13 x 9 baking pan.
3. Cream together the margarine and sugar replacement in a large bowl until smooth.
4. Add eggs and beat well. Beat in the cinnamon, cloves, and nutmeg.
5. Sift together the flour, baking soda, powder, and salt into the mixture alternately with the water. Stir in the sour cream, raisins, and walnuts.
6. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 30-35 minutes.
7. Let cool.
Recipe yields 18 servings at 124 calories per serving. Exchanges: 1 1/2 bread; 1 fat.
